18:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Multiple heads allow the model to attend to different representation subspaces simultaneously."}]
19:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"Feed-Forward Networks"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"After attention, each token is processed by:"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4
